overview: Adult Health NP of WNY provides testosterone replacement therapy, hormone replacement therapy, medical weight loss, and peptide therapy. Services are available through in-person visits at multiple Western New York locations and telemedicine for New York residents.
highlights: Multiple locations in Rochester, Buffalo, Syracuse, and Ithaca
Telemedicine available for New York residents
Peptide therapy including IGF-1 LR3, TB-500, and Hexarelin
targetAudience: Men seeking testosterone replacement and overall health optimization.
